ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the project was last updated */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's repository */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the project is expected to end */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "current_spend" REAL /* Current amount spent on the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the commit */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the commit */,
  "committer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Commit message detailing the changes made */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Unique hash for the commit */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch where the commit was made */,
  "file_changes" TEXT /* JSON object detailing the files changed in the commit */,
  "code_review_status" TEXT /* Status of the code review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_committer_id FOREIGN KEY ("committer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was hired */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_requests" (
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the pull request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who opened the pull request */,
  "date_opened" TEXT /* Date when the pull request was opened */,
  "date_closed" TEXT /* Date when the pull request was closed */,
  "merged" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the pull request was merged */,
  "base_branch" TEXT /* Base branch for the pull request */,
  "head_branch" TEXT /* Head branch for the pull request */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the pull request */,
  "merge_commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit that merged the pull request */,
  "merge_date" TEXT /* Date when the pull request was merged */,
  "merge_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who merged the pull request */,
  "comments" TEXT /* JSON object containing comments on the pull request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_merge_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("merge_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the issue */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the issue was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue */,
  "assigned_to_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the issue should be resolved */,
  "labels" TEXT /* JSON object containing labels for the issue */,
  "comments" TEXT /* JSON object containing comments on the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assigned_to_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchers" (
  "watcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watcher entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being watched */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user watching the project */,
  "watch_date" TEXT /* Date when the user started watching the project */,
  "last_notified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last notified about updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
